# Continuous build Changelog

- Release tag: `continuous`
- Target commit: `1f886df2fa8398ef6a85066f29b50af3c4395353`
- Previous marker: `e1c525815396ff499fbef193fcf50f802ec08cdb`

## Commits

- [3150196](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/315019621927615ba011a3bf7742ab5c2bcfa3b5) Add structured tactical environment, material, and liquid rules (#15). (#226)
- [80fa582](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/80fa582ac8a675bd329b5d98fcb057948bd756d0) Model-in-the-loop: direction docs + S1 ModelService (#230, #231) (#239)
- [6f50981](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/6f509817dedc8d5508bf3d6751e34003d0c38f2f) S2 — Live tag consolidation view (#232) (#240)
- [ed30eaa](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/ed30eaacb2baf3c432510a42915a6baf5bfe4a2e) Docs: model-always-present pivot — drop replay, checkpoints, safety-net fallbacks (#230). (#243)
- [8f70948](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/8f7094825bf54c6ffee00e914dd1bac21a843299) Cover silent model-call surfaces with Stage Manager banter (#244). (#247)
- [d8ec0f3](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/d8ec0f30058aadc7f42f65f4a06d172258cb01c8) Standardize two-tier smoke tests with CI gate (#242). (#248)
- [ac09360](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/ac093604c9bdd0e0898c283f0bcb82f1a88bd71e) Re-land S3 premise intake (#233) + fix the Windows test-tier gate (#242) (#249)
- [2a56f56](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/2a56f56264ac2363e29ae16e56983e5c10de678e) Add model-driven constrained question flow → generation config (#234). (#250)
- [1f886df](https://github.com/Zuljita/DungeonsOnAutomatic/commit/1f886df2fa8398ef6a85066f29b50af3c4395353) Ollama in the live tier + wait out model cold loads (detect & retry) (#252)
name: Continuous build
